title: Play That Funky Music
album: Club Epic - A Collection Of Classic Dance Mixes: Volume 4
why_this_song: Play That Funky Music by Wild Cherry (1976) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Play that funky music, white boy
Lay down the boogie and play that funky music 'til you die" (heh, heh)
Play that funky music right, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "funky" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "funky" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "play" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "play" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well, I tried to understand this (yeah)
When they were dancing and singing

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Hey, once I was a boogie singer
Play that funky music, white boy

exercises.prompt_en: "Play That Funky Music" was released in 1976. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Play That Funky Music" foi lançada em 1976. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Play That Funky Music" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Play That Funky Music" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Wild Cherry one question about "Play That Funky Music", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Wild Cherry sobre "Play That Funky Music", o que seria e por quê?
